tools.name: bash -n (shell syntax check)
tools.purpose: Validates shell script syntax across ultrainit.sh and all lib/*.sh files without executing them
key_rules: find . -name '*.sh' -not -path './test-repos/*' | xargs bash -n — all shell files must parse cleanly

tools.name: jq (JSON schema validation)
tools.purpose: Validates all schemas/*.json files are well-formed JSON
key_rules: jq empty on every file in schemas/ — malformed JSON is a CI failure

tools.name: bats-core (Bash Automated Testing System)
tools.purpose: Unit, integration, and edge-case test suite for all bash functions and scripts; no real Claude calls (mock binary intercepts all claude invocations)
key_rules: make test-unit / test-scripts / test-edge / test-all targets
Mock claude binary must be used — no real API calls in tests
bats-support, bats-assert, bats-file helper libraries installed at v1.11.1

tools.name: validate-skill.sh (custom skill validator)
tools.purpose: Validates generated Claude Code skill files: frontmatter format, kebab-case naming, required fields (name, description), codebase-specific file references, verification section, no generic phrases
key_rules: Frontmatter must include name (kebab-case) and description with trigger phrases and negative scope

tools.name: validate-subagent.sh (custom subagent validator)
tools.purpose: Validates generated Claude Code subagent files: frontmatter, name/description fields with trigger phrases, tool scoping, minimum codebase-specific references
key_rules: Frontmatter must have name and description with trigger phrases
Tool scoping must match stated purpose
